instruction: Help me enter the sales forecast data into the forecast table

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Sales Forecast Report
Forecast Period: 2025 Q2
Owner: Sales Director Miao Ze
Market Context: Industry grew 8.5% in Q1, competition intensifying
Q2 Sales Forecast:
  North Region: 4.8M CNY (12% growth over Q1)
  South Region: 6.2M CNY (8% growth over Q1)
  East Region: 7.1M CNY (15% growth over Q1)
  National Total: 18.1M CNY
Key Assumption: No major policy changes, key clients remain stable' > /home/user/Desktop/sales_forecast.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = 'Region'; ws['B1'] = 'Q2 Forecast(10K CNY)'; ws['C1'] = 'Growth over Q1(%)'; ws['D1'] = 'Owner'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/forecast_table.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: Help me enter the sales forecast data into the forecast table

Fill the forecast data from /home/user/Desktop/sales_forecast.txt into /home/user/Desktop/forecast_table.xlsx rows 2-4: A2='North Region', B2=480, C2=12, D2='Miao Ze'; A3='South Region', B3=620, C3=8, D3='Miao Ze'; A4='East Region', B4=710, C4=15, D4='Miao Ze', save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/forecast_table.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'Miao Ze' in s else 'FAILED')"
